description_long: This is a rectangular cigarette pack labeled 'COMPLIMENT VIOLET' with a predominantly white exterior and a purple accent band near the top. The front features a large health warning in Ukrainian, while the back displays another warning with an image of cigarettes and a tax stamp. The sides are slim, with one side showing a barcode and the other side containing additional product information. The pack appears to be made of glossy cardboard, typical for cigarette packaging, and is sealed. The overall design is clean and modern, with clear branding and regulatory markings.
description: A white and purple 'COMPLIMENT VIOLET' cigarette pack with health warnings and branding, made of glossy cardboard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'COMPLIMENT' branding and a large health warning in Ukrainian.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a slim profile with a barcode and vertical text.
description_view_2: Back view featuring a health warning with an image, a tax stamp, and additional branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with product information and a tax stamp visible on the top flap.
attribute_brand_logo: The pack displays the 'COMPLIMENT' brand name prominently in white text on a purple band.
